data.title: Berlin U-Bahn Fine: Caught Without a Ticket
h1s: Berlin U-Bahn Fine: What Happens If You Are Caught Without a Ticket
data.description: Berlin U-Bahn fine guide: what happens if you are caught without a valid ticket, the EUR 60 EBE, forgotten subscriptions, deadlines and next steps.
data.ogTitle: Berlin U-Bahn Fine: Caught Without a Ticket

captionStyles.text: Berlin U-Bahn platforms usually have open access, but ticket checks still happen inside trains and stations.

matches.text: Berlin U-Bahn platforms usually have open access, but ticket checks still happen inside trains and stations.

captionStyles.text: Buying the ticket is only half the job if it is a paper ticket; the validity rules still matter.

matches.text: Buying the ticket is only half the job if it is a paper ticket; the validity rules still matter.

captionStyles.text: For many Berlin paper tickets, this small stamp is the difference between bought and valid.

matches.text: For many Berlin paper tickets, this small stamp is the difference between bought and valid.

captionStyles.text: At big stations like Alexanderplatz, validators are easy to miss when you are focused on platforms and connections.

matches.text: At big stations like Alexanderplatz, validators are easy to miss when you are focused on platforms and connections.

captionStyles.text: Keep the original ticket and fine receipt until the case is paid or closed.

matches.text: Keep the original ticket and fine receipt until the case is paid or closed.
